rationale: The citing study centers on private-label performance and pricing/marketing-mix elasticities in retail categories, while the cited paper directly models retailer category pricing and store-brand objectives with joint demand–pricing estimation. That conceptual and methodological overlap makes substantive use plausible (e.g., theory or pricing-method background), not an obvious incidental mention. Given this and the lack of dismissive context in the provided evidence, this pair should be retained for second-stage judgment.
